insertion.name: insertion
insertion.note: fixed: rehosted a 650KB slice of the HG002 PacBio Sequel 15kb BAM (1:55.70-55.71Mb, 70 reads) to s3://jbrowse.org/demos/hg002 so the PacBio track loads reliably (full remote NCBI BAM intermittently errored); Illumina track now shows soft clipping at the insertion. All three read tracks render the nstd175 insertion.

multisv.name: multisv
multisv.note: fixed: showDescriptions:false added to the ncbi_refseq gene track display; renders against local build

alignment_clipping_indicators.name: alignment_clipping_indicators
alignment_clipping_indicators.note: fixed: replaced the wide 28kb SKBR3 illumina view (tiny scattered ticks) with the volvox long-read SV BAM zoomed onto an SV breakpoint at ctgA:2560-2760. Reads clip hard at the breakpoint column, giving a tall unmistakable clip-indicator stack where coverage drops to zero, plus readable clip/insertion ticks above the coverage band.

sv_cgiab/synteny_view.name: sv_cgiab/synteny_view

Band height note: levelHeights was bogus, removed; viewport sized to fit both LGV panels

linear_synteny.name: linear_synteny

Ribbons now stay inside the view.
